0.q: AsA levels and AsA redox were higher, but reactive oxygen species (ROS) accumulation was lower in both PpGMP1- and PpCML14-overexpressing rice lines under drought and salinity conditions compared with wild-type plants.

1.q: PpGMP1 (GDP-D-mannose pyrophosphorylase 1), a key enzyme for ascorbic acid (AsA) biosynthesis, was identified as interacting with PpCML14 based on screening of cDNA library and further confirmation using the methods of yeast-two-hybridization, firefly luciferase complementation imaging (LCI), pull-down, and co-immunoprecipitation (Co-IP).

2.q: The results indicated that AsA biosynthesis is regulated by the PpCML14–PpGMP1 module. It is suggested that PpCML14 confers drought and salinity tolerance through... activating PpGMP1 to improve AsA biosynthesis.

3.q: Overexpression of PpGMP1 in rice led to increased drought and salinity tolerance. AsA levels and AsA redox were higher ... in both PpGMP1- and PpCML14-overexpressing rice lines.

4.q: Overexpression of PpGMP1 in rice led to increased drought and salinity tolerance. AsA levels and AsA redox were higher ... in both PpGMP1- and PpCML14-overexpressing rice lines.

5.q: AsA levels and AsA redox were higher, but reactive oxygen species (ROS) accumulation was lower in both PpGMP1- and PpCML14-overexpressing rice lines under drought and salinity conditions compared with wild-type plants.

6.q: PpGMP1 (GDP-D-mannose pyrophosphorylase 1), a key enzyme for ascorbic acid (AsA) biosynthesis.
